---
id: get-disclosure-requests-stats
title: "Obtener estadísticas de disclosure requests"
description: "Obtiene estadísticas agregadas de los disclosures requests, incluyendo conteos totales,"
sidebar_label: "Obtener estadísticas de disclosure requests"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/resources/soyio-api
custom_edit_url: null
show_extensions: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Obtener estadísticas de disclosure requests"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/disclosure_requests/stats.{format}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



<details>
<summary><strong>Permisos requeridos</strong></summary>

**Dashboard:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `disclosure.dashboard.read`
- `disclosure.dashboard.manage`

**API Keys:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `disclosure_requests.api.read`
- `disclosure_requests.api.manage`
- `disclosure.api.read`
- `disclosure.api.manage`
- `disclosure.api.manage`

</details>



Obtiene estadísticas agregadas de los disclosures requests, incluyendo conteos totales,
tasas de conversión, distribución por estado, tiempos de otorgamiento, el embudo de
validación asociado a esos disclosures y series temporales por día.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"format","in":"path","description":"Formato de respuesta para estadísticas","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["json","csv"],"default":"json"},"example":"json"},{"name":"page","in":"query","description":"Número de página","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"default":1},"example":1},{"name":"per_page","in":"query","description":"Número de entradas por página","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":100,"default":20},"example":20},{"name":"order_by","in":"query","description":"Orden de los resultados (ej. \"created_at DESC\")","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"created_at DESC"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Estadísticas de diclosures","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"stats":{"type":"object","description":"Estadísticas de disclosures","properties":{"count":{"type":"integer","description":"Número total de disclosures","example":200},"strict_conversion_rate":{"type":"number","format":"float","description":"Tasa de conversión estricta (usuarios únicos que completaron vs usuarios únicos que intentaron)","example":0.75},"conversion_rate":{"type":"number","format":"float","description":"Tasa de conversión general (solicitudes completadas vs total de solicitudes)","example":0.8},"status_distribution":{"type":"object","description":"Distribución de disclosures por estado","additionalProperties":{"type":"number","format":"float"},"example":{"granted":0.6,"pending":0.3,"rejected":0.1}},"average_disclosures_per_user":{"type":"number","format":"float","description":"Promedio de disclosures por usuario","example":1.5},"average_disclosure_time_seconds":{"type":["number","null"],"format":"float","description":"Tiempo promedio entre la creación del disclosure y su otorgamiento.","example":640},"validation_summary":{"type":"object","properties":{"total_validation_attempts":{"type":"integer","example":120},"successful_validation_attempts":{"type":"integer","example":84},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"],"format":"float","example":0.7},"average_validation_time_seconds":{"type":["number","null"],"format":"float","example":240},"average_tries_until_success":{"type":["number","null"],"format":"float","example":1.8}},"title":"DisclosureRequestValidationSummary"},"validation_funnel":{"type":"object","properties":{"disclosures_with_validation_attempt":{"type":"integer","example":90},"disclosures_with_successful_validation":{"type":"integer","example":72}},"title":"DisclosureRequestValidationFunnel"},"disclosure_template_distribution":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Identificador estable de la plantilla de disclosure","example":"dtpl_abc123"},"label":{"type":"string","description":"Nombre visible de la plantilla de disclosure","example":"Flujo principal"},"disclosure_total":{"type":"integer","example":20},"disclosure_granted":{"type":"integer","example":12},"disclosure_grant_rate":{"type":["number","null"],"format":"float","example":0.6}},"title":"DisclosureRequestTemplateDistributionItem"}},"validation_profile_distribution":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"validation_total":{"type":"integer"},"validation_successful":{"type":"integer"},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"]}},"title":"ValidationAttemptStatsDistributionItem"}},"time_series":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"bucket":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2026-03-30T00:00:00Z"},"disclosure_total":{"type":"integer","example":42},"disclosure_granted":{"type":"integer","example":24},"disclosure_failed":{"type":"integer","example":8},"disclosure_timed_out":{"type":"integer","example":3},"disclosures_with_validation_attempt":{"type":"integer","example":32},"disclosures_with_successful_validation":{"type":"integer","example":22},"validation_total":{"type":"integer","example":38},"validation_successful":{"type":"integer","example":24},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"],"format":"float","example":0.6316},"average_disclosure_time_seconds":{"type":["number","null"],"format":"float","example":640},"average_validation_time_seconds":{"type":["number","null"],"format":"float","example":240}},"title":"DisclosureRequestStatsTimeSeriesPoint"}},"validation_profile_time_series":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"bucket":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2026-03-30T00:00:00Z"},"key":{"type":"string","example":"full_with_government_check"},"disclosures_with_validation_attempt":{"type":"integer","example":18},"disclosures_with_successful_validation":{"type":"integer","example":12},"validation_total":{"type":"integer","example":21},"validation_successful":{"type":"integer","example":12},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"],"format":"float","example":0.5714}},"title":"DisclosureRequestValidationProfileTimeSeriesPoint"}}},"title":"DisclosureRequestStats"}}}},"text/csv":{"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Datos de estadísticas en formato CSV","example":"disclosures_count,strict_conversion_rate,conversion_rate,average_disclosure_per_user,average_disclosure_time_seconds,total_validation_attempts,successful_validation_attempts,validation_success_rate,average_validation_time_seconds,average_tries_until_success,disclosures_with_validation_attempt,disclosures_with_successful_validation\n200,0.75,0.8,1.5,640,120,84,0.7,240,1.8,90,72\n"}}}},"401":{"description":"Error de autenticación","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["type","title","status","detail"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","example":"authentication_error"},"title":{"type":"string","example":"Unauthorized"},"status":{"type":"integer","example":401},"detail":{"type":"string","example":"We could not authenticate your credentials. Please check the documentation at https://docs.soyio.id"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
